text: Moving through these spaces, I feel a mixture of anticipation and wonder. The first space is open and empty, an architectural invitation to pause and consider purpose and potential; the presence of safety equipment and clean lines evoke calm detachment, but also readiness. Upon entering the second space, vibrant colors and engaging displays immerse me; curiosity awakens as words and images entice me to reflect on the relationship between research, technology, and being. Here, my mind is alert, eager to decode and understand, sensing the pulse of creative innovation.
